name: Arabian Pipes Company
summary: Arabian Pipes Company manufactures and markets welded steel pipes for oil and gas, structural, and commercial applications primarily in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. The company offers electric resistant welded/HFW, longitudinal submerged-arc welded carbon steel, external coating, threading and coupling, and slitting pipes. It also exports its products to Gulf countries, the Middle East, and North Africa. The company was formerly known as Saudi Joint Stock Co. Arabian Pipes Company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Riyadh, the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
